title: codemap.public_api.changed v1
description: Emitted by codemapd when a reindex detects that a CROSS-REPO-VISIBLE contract changed in a repo: a bus channel's producer/consumer set, a schema, or an exported FFI/HTTP symbol. Carries the blast radius (affected_repos) so consumers like hearth-loom can file a bead to update dependents. Private-prefixed channels (tachyonos.*, tengine.diag.*, hearth.market.state.*) MUST be redacted from this payload before emit.

repo.description: repo whose reindex produced the change

head.description: git HEAD sha after the change

name.description: channel name, schema name, or exported symbol

affected_repos.description: other repos that produce/consume this contract (the blast radius); empty = no cross-repo dependents
